name: Doro AB (publ)
summary: Doro AB (publ), a technology company, develops products and services for seniors. It offers easy-to-use mobile and smart phones, home telephones, and accessories; corded phones and cordless models; stationary and mobile social alarms, digital social alarms, GPS-alarms, and telecare solutions; and products for remote supervision and monitoring. The company also provides end-to-end digital alarm chain services. It sells its products in approximately 28 countries primarily through a network of telecom operators, distributors, specialists, and dealers. The company serves public actors, civil society, and private companies. Doro AB (publ) was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
